title: nepeta ciliaris
intro: Nepeta ciliaris, also known as Mexican mint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta ciliaris include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Nepeta ciliaris can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
